# aigateway_api_key (Resource)

A gateway API key. The plaintext `key` is returned exactly once at create time — store it as a sensitive output.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "aigateway_api_key" "librechat" {
  name = "librechat"
  # no budget_microdollars → unlimited
}

output "librechat_gateway_key" {
  value     = aigateway_api_key.librechat.key
  sensitive = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Human-readable key name.

### Optional

- `allowed_models` (List of String) Restrict the key to these model ids. Empty = all tenant-allowed models.
- `allowed_providers` (List of String) Restrict the key to these provider ids. Empty = all.
- `budget_microdollars` (Number) Monthly budget cap in microdollars. Omit / null for unlimited.
- `rate_limit_rpm` (Number) Requests-per-minute limit for the key.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Server-assigned key id (key_<uuid>).
- `key` (String, Sensitive) The full plaintext key (aig_…). Available only right after create; null after import.
- `key_prefix` (String) Key prefix shown in listings.
- `status` (String) active | revoked | expired.
